response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong software development skills and a broad range of experience, including geospatial projects and open-source contributions. However, his recent work lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, such as modern C++/Rust development for routing/navigation systems or distributed systems expertise. His background in full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure at Google and Meta is impressive but not directly transferable to this specialized role.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms and open-source GIS projects (e.g., GISCollective, Green Map).
Proven track record in building scalable systems and optimizing performance (e.g., low-latency apps at Dunnhumby, micro-services at Meta).
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn new technologies, as evidenced by diverse project contributions.
concerns: Lack of recent or primary experience with C++ or Rust, the core languages for this role.
No explicit mention of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or navigation/routing data pipelines in recent roles.
Current focus on full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure at Google may not align with the specialized requirements of this role.
